extraction_reasoning: The litigation table separates matters by direction and category: against the Company are 1 criminal, 11 tax and 5 statutory/regulatory matters; against Directors are 3 criminal and 3 statutory/regulatory matters; and against Subsidiaries are 1 criminal, 44 tax and 13 statutory/regulatory matters. I counted only the Against rows for category counts, excluded all By Company/Directors/Subsidiaries rows, and for the aggregate group amount used the stated quantified Against Company amount of ₹59.57 million plus Against Subsidiaries amount of ₹195.21 million, excluding personal Director matters, for ₹254.78 million. The contingent-liabilities figure is the explicitly stated total of ₹53.98 million as at March 31, 2024, converted from the latest date shown. No company-wide top-five or top-ten customer concentration percentage is disclosed; the percentages shown elsewhere relate to other metrics or specific businesses and are not customer concentration. The source monetary tables use ₹ in millions; ₹254.78 million ÷ 10 = ₹25.478 crore and ₹53.98 million ÷ 10 = ₹5.398 crore.
